## Horn: Add Horn To Vehicles ## 
 **Horn** is a Minecraft Fabric mod that introduces a fun and functional feature to your boats and minecarts by adding a horn.
 
This mod allows players to customize their travel experiences with the addition of a horn sound. Whether you're cruising through the water in a boat or speeding along the rails in a minecart, you can now signal others or simply enjoy the new sound effect.

This mod is functional but still in development. The mod will be updated for newer versions, and plans include adding new horn effects in future updates.

For issues and feedback: (Email) lyki@lyki.dev or (Discord) https://go.lyki.dev/dc

**Works together both on the server and client sides.**
